{{CargoRelic
|name=Cassandra’s Scroll
|class_id=21546
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Apollo-cursed prophecies in blood ink. New truths emerge when Trojan horses move.
|fame=73
|art=37
|fth=39
|civ=47
|tech=47
|ss1=Protomon Troop assist DMG + 240<br>Per 5 FAME Relics awakened, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +72<br>FAME Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss2=Protomon Troop assist DMG + 320<br>Per 5 FAME Relics awakened, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +96<br>FAME Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss3=Protomon Troop assist DMG + 400<br>Per 5 FAME Relics awakened, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +120<br>FAME Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss4=Protomon Troop assist DMG + 560<br>Per 5 FAME Relics awakened, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +168<br>FAME Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss5=Protomon Troop assist DMG + 720<br>Per 5 FAME Relics awakened, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +216<br>FAME Relics Awakened: 100/100
|ss7=Protomon Troop assist DMG + 720<br>Per 5 FAME Relics awakened, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +216<br>FAME Relics Awakened: 100/100<br>Protomon Troop assist DMG + 560 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Purple Reagent Drops +3%
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill II.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's FAME +10
}}
